name: setup-buildx-action
description: Production-grade Docker Buildx GitHub Action with caching (GHA, registry, local)

scripts.build: npm run build:index && npm run build:post && npm run finalize
scripts.finalize: cp dist/index/index.js dist/index.js && cp dist/post/index.js dist/post.js && rm -rf dist/index dist/post

author: Ananta Cloud
